mapper.insert: INSERT INTO practice_set_attempts ( user_id, node_id, total_count, correct_count, status, passed, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{nodeId}, #{totalCount}, #{correctCount}, #{status}, #{passed}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE practice_set_attempts SET correct_count = #{correctCount}, status = #{status}, passed = #{passed}, completed_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE set_attempt_id = #{setAttemptId}
